name: Bubble Heroes
author: Poki
description: Bubble Heroes is a bubble-shooter puzzle game full of exciting challenges and popping fun! Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to clear the board and unlock new levels. Tap to switch bubble colors, plan your shots carefully, and use your puzzle-solving skills to earn awesome rewards. With tons of levels and mysterious episodes to explore, Bubble Heroes is bursting with fun! Ready to pop your way to victory? How to play Bubble Heroes? Hold to aim and release to shoot. Who created Bubble Heroes? Bubble Heroes is created by Hyperkani. Play their other games on Poki: Stunt Bike Extreme , Stunt Car Extreme and Stunt Car Challenge 3 How can I play Bubble Heroes for free? You can play Bubble Heroes for free on Poki. Can I play Bubble Heroes on mobile devices and desktop? Bubble Heroes can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
